title: 'My soul left my body': customers see bills in the billions after AWS billing system goes haywire — but don't go emptying your bank accounts
summary: AWS has even tried to make light of the mistake, posting this on X : "Typo alert: Some customers saw quadrillion-dollar AWS billing estimates today. How big was your AWS Billing mistake?
